name: io.github.RonieNeubauer/cli2mcp
title: cli2mcp
description: Wrap any CLI as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Gemini and any MCP-compatible client — schema auto-inferred from --help.

packageArguments.description: The CLI binary to wrap (must be installed and on PATH). Examples: rg, jq, pandoc, sqlite3, yt-dlp.
